history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person takes a mirror selfie indoors, leaning near a curtain with a smartphone held up in front of their face.

Main Subject:
A person with dark, slightly tousled hair stands in front of a mirror, holding a black smartphone toward the camera with one hand while looking toward the mirror. They wear a gray zip-up hoodie over a dark shirt, a thin chain necklace with a small cross-shaped pendant, and in-ear style white earphones. Their posture is slightly turned, with one shoulder closer to the camera and the other angled back, and their face is partially lit by the phone screen.

Setting:
The scene is indoors in a room with wooden flooring and a large, wall-sized mirror. Behind the person, there is a dark desk chair and a blue-toned item or wall area near the back left. The mirror reflects parts of the room, including a ceiling with beams or panels and a bright overhead light.

Visual Details:
The lighting is warm and indoor, creating soft shadows on the person’s face and clothing. The gray hoodie has a visible zipper and ribbed cuffs. The curtain on the right side hangs in vertical folds, partially covering the wall. The composition is a close, side-angle mirror view with the phone and the person centered, and the curtain forming a vertical frame on the right.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person standing in front of a mirror and holding up a smartphone to take a selfie. They are dressed in a gray hoodie and dark top, with white earphones and a small necklace visible.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with messy, dark, curly hair is taking a selfie in a dimly lit room. He's wearing a grey zip-up hoodie over a black t-shirt and black pants. He has a silver cross necklace and white wireless earbuds in his ears. He's holding a black smartphone in his right hand, and his left hand is casually in his pocket. The background shows a dark wall with some abstract shapes and a large, black, rolling office chair. To the right, there's a grey curtain. The lighting is soft and somewhat moody, with a focus on the subject. The overall color palette is muted, with grays, blacks, and dark blues dominating, creating a relaxed and casual atmosphere. The style is modern and streetwear-inspired.
